REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-22-2018 IN DEPT. 206 - ***[CROSS-COMPLAINT OF DREXEL BRADSHAW DISMISSED]*** APPEARANCES BY JEFFREY CHEN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; THOMAS O'BRIEN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT THE MARGOT S. PARKE LIVING TRUST; NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THIS MATTER WAS RETURNED FROM DEPT. 505, JUDGE CHARLES HAINES, AND PLACED BACK ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR IN DEPT. 206 FOR 10/22/18. THE COURT CONFIRMED THAT JUDGE HAINES HAD ORDERED ALL PARTIES THAT APPEARED BEFORE HIM ON 10/19/18 TO RETURN TO DEPT. 206 FOR APPEARANCE ON 10/22/18. DREXEL BRADSHAW, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT, WAS PRESENT ON 10/19/18 BEFORE JUDGE HAINES, HOWEVER HE DID NOT APPEAR AT THIS TRIAL CALL ON 10/22/18. THE COURT DISMISSED THE CROSS-COMPLAINT OF DREXEL BRADSHAW FOR LACK OF PROSECUTION/NON-APPEARANCE AT TRIAL CALL. THE COURT VACATED THE TRIAL DATE AND SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 610 ON JAN-23-2019 AT 10:30 AM FOR STATUS OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL OBTAINING LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT. COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE CMC. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/TLJ)

PARKE TRUST BEING AN LLC INSTEAD OF A TRUST, AND MOVES THE COURT TO ALLOW HIM TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT DECLINES TO ADDRESS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey A. Chen, ESQ. (888-418-8367) for Plaintiff/opposing party Faranak Aliabadi.
Peter N. Hadiaris, ESQ. (415-433-4800) of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. for Defendant/Moving party THE MARGOT S. PARKE LIVING TRUST who arrives at 9:44am.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. Parties ARGUED re light pole, demuurer is only as to 3rd cause of action. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs THE MARGOT S. PARKE LIVING TRUST and DREXEL BRADSHAW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress, including but not limited to fact re: intent. Moving party is ordered to complaint with SFRL 2.7B in future. No courtesy copy of the operative complaint was provided. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
